array.string: cd '/Users/rajatsingh/Downloads/S4 AI Agency/S4 AI LLC/Client Database/Mayberry Pressure Washing LLC/site' && /usr/bin/env node scripts/sync-google-reviews.mjs --maybe-post --local-data >> logs/google-post-automation.log 2>&1
